calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment; Memorandum Of Points & Authorities In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Sep-23-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF ENVIRONMENTAL RESEARCH CENTER's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment is Granted, no opposition filed and the motion complies with the Health and Safety Code. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT

Off Calendar Nov-07-2013 Set For Trial On Aug-18-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
